items.caption: A vintage advertisement for national lead company, featuring a black and white illustration of various lead-based items and text. the illustration includes a depiction of a house with a lead pipe, a lead pipe with a faucet, a lead pipe with a spigot, and a lead pipe with a valve. the text in the image includes a headline that reads "lead helps to guard your health" and a subheading that states "you wouldn't live today in a house without an adequate plumbing system." the text also includes a paragraph about lead pipe centuries old and how it is used in modern buildings. the advertisement is promoting the use of lead in plumbing and other household items, highlighting its historical and modern applications.
